reference: Hi, you can take the Lupigest tablet from day sixteen and continue it for two weeks. It is actually given to support the implantation of a baby. After two weeks, you can stop the tablet and do a pregnancy test. If it is positive, meet your doctor. If it is negative, then you can wait for one to two weeks to get your period. Hope I have answered your question.
text: Hi, you can take the lupigest tablet from day 16 and continue it for two weeks. It is actually given to support the implantation of a baby. After two weeks, you can stop the tablet and do a pregnancy test. If it is positive, meet your doctor. If it is negative, then you can wait for one to two weeks to get your period. Hope I have answered your question.
